subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained the presence of God and hearkened unto His most sweet call and stood before the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تشرف بلقا الله و فاز بندائه الاحلی و حضر لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
